author: anon-2101b8a8
content: Fixing 4 bugs: (1) OPTICS — add predecessor tracking + min_cluster_size + fix steep matching, (2) Birch — replace KMeans with AgglomerativeClustering Ward, (3) PowerTransformer — add Brent's method to ferrolearn-numerical + use it, (4) StratifiedKFold — round-robin fold_offset for remainder distribution
